case_title: MACINNIS, DONNER & KOPLOWITZ VS. TIMOTHY F. JONES

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARB AWARD PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECT 1285 ET SEQ. FILED BY PETITIONER MACINNIS, DONNER & KOPLOWITZ HEARING SET FOR MAY-17-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARD PURSNAT OT CCP SEC 1285 FILED BY PETITIONER MACINNIS, DONNER & KOPLOWITZ HEARING SET FOR JUN-04-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER MACINNIS, DONNER & KOPLOWITZ'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECT 1285 ET SEQ. IS CONTINUED TO MAY 25, 2011 FOR PETITIONER TO PROVIDE DEPARTMENT 301 WITH ENDORSED-FILED COURTESY COPIES OF THE PETITION AND A PROOF OF SERVICE INDICATIVE OF SUFFICIENT NOTICE OF HEARING UNDER C C P 1290.2 NO LATER THAN MAY 18, 2011. SEE LOCAL RULE 2.6 (B). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

LAW AND MOTION, 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER MACINNIS, DONNER & KOPLOWITZ' AMENDED NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER, CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER MACINNIS, DONNER & KOPLOWITZ' PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD PURSUANT TO CCP SEC 1285 IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.
ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD
